Features

Farm-Style Plots
Crafted for Living

EVOLVE is built on a simple idea
Land should not just be owned, it should be lived.

In a time where spaces are shrinking, we bring back openness, nature, and a more mindful way of thinking.

A place where you can plant, grow, and build while your investment evolves with time.

This is not just real estate. A more meaningful way to own land.

Explore Features

Designed for Natural Living

EVOLVE is equipped to support both lifestyle and land value through practical on-ground infrastructure and nature-first planning.

Drip irrigationWater and electricity supportSecurity and maintenance options

A Space That Grows With You

Build something personal, grow something green, or keep it untouched. The layout is intentionally flexible for different ownership goals.

Low-density layoutClear land structuringFarm-ready infrastructure

Part of Hyderabad’s Future City Vision

Located within the FCDA influence zone, this location is aligned with future-focused urban development potential.

AI / Sports / Health zonesUniversity hub proximityHigh-growth destination potential

Phase 1 Master Plan Overview

A 12-acre, limited-plots, low-density master plan with clearly organized facing options and planned internal roads.

Limited plotsEast / West / North facing optionsStructured phase layout

Strong Connectivity

Strategically connected to key road and growth corridors for faster access to major urban and transport points.

10 mins to radial road20 mins to proposed rail terminal15 mins to Future City

Let’s Connect

Dedicated visit support with direct call access and QR-based location sharing for quick and simple site planning.

Site visit assistanceDirect phone contactScan-to-location convenience

Project Features

Built for lifestyle comfort and long-term land value with practical infrastructure.

Rainwater Harvesting

Internal Roads
